div.p: Mapping from http://whonet.org/CodeSystem/antibiotic to All LOINC codes
Group 1 Mapping from http://whonet.org/CodeSystem/antibiotic to Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC)

tr.td: Codes from Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC)

title.value: WHONET Antibiotic Codes to LOINC Susceptibility Codes

description.value: Maps WHONET antibiotic codes to LOINC susceptibility test codes. Derived from the AMR R package (https://github.com/msberends/AMR). Contains 271 WHONET antibiotic codes with LOINC mappings. Note: equivalence is 'relatedto' because one WHONET antibiotic code maps to multiple LOINC codes representing different test methods (MIC, disk diffusion, etc.).
